title: Who is Kirklin Mack? YouTuber goes viral after convincing Adam Raby to rob fake bank, fans compare him to MrBeast
summary_full: Kirklin Mack’s viral fake bank robbery video crossed 5.2 million views, sparking comparisons to Jimmy Donaldson. The high-budget staged stunt, featuring Adam Raby, actors, and a shut down town, showed his growing scale. Fans on X are calling him the next MrBeast, as his content style and production value continue gaining strong attention online.
